journey.name: Settings Screen Full Interaction
journey.description: Verify all Settings screen elements and interactions including theme change, unit system change, save button enablement, discard dialog, and profile fields. iOS parity: SettingsTests (all 15+ tests)

actions.action: Tap the settings gear icon in the top-right corner of the dashboard
Verify the Settings screen appears with "Cancel" and "Save" buttons in the top bar
Verify the "Save" button is initially disabled (grayed out)
Verify the "App Appearance" section is visible with "Theme" and "Unit System" controls
Verify the Theme picker shows three options: System, Light, Dark
Verify the Unit System picker shows two options: US Customary, Metric
Verify the Profile section is visible with Height, Weight, Age, Gender, Activity Level fields
Verify the screen's background color changes immediately to a dark color
Verify the "Save" button is now enabled (no longer grayed out)
Verify the Settings screen is still displayed with "Dark" theme selected
Verify the "Discard changes?" dialog appears again
Verify the dashboard is displayed and the theme has reverted back (not dark)
